query:
CREATE TABLE kyc_questionnaires (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  annualIncome VARCHAR(50),
  netWorth VARCHAR(50),
  liquidAssets VARCHAR(50),
  employmentStatus VARCHAR(50),
  occupation VARCHAR(255),
  investmentExperience VARCHAR(50),
  realEstateExperience VARCHAR(50),
  previousInvestments TEXT,
  riskTolerance VARCHAR(50),
  isAccredited BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  accreditationType VARCHAR(100),
  investmentGoals TEXT,
  investmentHorizon VARCHAR(50),
  expectedReturnRate VARCHAR(50),
  sourceOfFunds VARCHAR(100),
  sourceOfFundsDetails TEXT,
  politicallyExposed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  pepDetails TEXT,
  additionalNotes TEXT,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  reviewNotes TEXT,
  submittedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  reviewedBy INT,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (reviewedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX user_id_idx (userId)
);

  pepDetails TEXT,

  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,

  reviewedBy INT,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (reviewedBy) REFERENCES users(id),

);
